---
title: "Visualizations"
output: html_document
date: "2025-04-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r cars}
# Load required libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)

# Create the data frame
data <- read.csv("/Users/anaghchattopadhyay/Documents/Nilanjan\ Project/TMC_BCProject/Data/BC_data_new.csv")
# Pivot to long format
data_long <- pivot_longer(data,
                          cols = -Registry..year.,
                          names_to = "AgeGroup",
                          values_to = "Incidence")

# Clean AgeGroup (remove "X" and replace "." with "-")
data_long <- data_long %>%
  mutate(
    AgeGroup = gsub("^X", "", AgeGroup),
    AgeGroup = gsub("\\.", "-", AgeGroup)
  )

# Create numeric age midpoint (used for plotting)
data_long <- data_long %>%
  mutate(
    AgeMid = case_when(
      AgeGroup == "0-4" ~ 2.5,
      AgeGroup == "5-9" ~ 7.5,
      AgeGroup == "10-14" ~ 12.5,
      AgeGroup == "15-19" ~ 17.5,
      AgeGroup == "20-24" ~ 22.5,
      AgeGroup == "25-29" ~ 27.5,
      AgeGroup == "30-34" ~ 32.5,
      AgeGroup == "35-39" ~ 37.5,
      AgeGroup == "40-44" ~ 42.5,
      AgeGroup == "45-49" ~ 47.5,
      AgeGroup == "50-54" ~ 52.5,
      AgeGroup == "55-59" ~ 57.5,
      AgeGroup == "60-64" ~ 62.5,
      AgeGroup == "65-69" ~ 67.5,
      AgeGroup == "70-74" ~ 72.5,
      AgeGroup == "75+" ~ 80
    )
  )

library(grid)

ggplot(data_long, aes(x = AgeMid, y = Incidence, color = Registry..year.)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    title = "Breast Cancer Incidence Rate by Age Group",
    x = "Age (years)",
    y = "Incidence rate (per 100,000 population)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    legend.margin = margin(l = 5),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray85"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1, byrow = TRUE))

```
